content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/kuadrant-console-plugin/source/src/components/KuadrantTLSCreatePage.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 5 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 342
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: link

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Code context:
```
  341                  />
  342                  <Button variant="link" onClick={handleCancelResource}>
  343                    {t('Cancel')}

```

### Fix 2
Line: 342
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: ActionGroup

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
  341                  />
  342                  <Button variant="link" onClick={handleCancelResource}>
  343                    {t('Cancel')}

```

### Fix 3
Line: 294
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <HelperTextItem> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <HelperTextItem> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <HelperTextItem variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <HelperTextItem> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <HelperTextItem><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</HelperTextItem>

Incident context:
  componentName: HelperTextItem
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: HelperText

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: HelperTextItem
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
  293                    <HelperText>
  294                      <HelperTextItem>{t('Unique name of the TLSPolicy.')}</HelperTextItem>
  295                    </HelperText>

```

### Fix 4
Line: 235
Rule [sd-new-absorbing-prop-page-banner]:
Component <Page> has a new prop `banner` (type: `React.ReactNode`) added in v6 that accepts JSX content.

This prop may be intended to receive content that was previously passed as children. Review the JSX children of <Page> and determine if any should be moved to the `banner` prop.

Example migration:
  Before: <Page>{content} other children</Page>
  After:  <Page banner=>other children</Page>

Incident context:
  componentName: Page
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: __ComponentReturn__

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Page
Prop: banner
To: React.ReactNode

Code context:
```
  234        </Helmet>
  235        <Page>
  236          <PageSection className="pf-m-no-padding" variant="light">

```

### Fix 5
Lines: 236, 278
Rule [sd-prop-value-pagesection-variant-light]:
The value "light" is no longer valid for the `variant` prop on <PageSection>.
Choose the appropriate replacement from the valid values: "default", "secondary"

Review the component documentation to determine which value best matches the behavior of "light".

Incident context:
  componentName: PageSection
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: light

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropValueChange
Component: PageSection
Prop: variant
From: light

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 236):
  235        <Page>
  236          <PageSection className="pf-m-no-padding" variant="light">
  237            <div className="co-m-nav-title">

  (line 278):
  277          {view === 'form' ? (
  278            <PageSection variant="light">
  279              <Form className="co-m-pane__form">

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/kuadrant-console-plugin/source/src/components/KuadrantTLSCreatePage.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed (line 342)
The value `"link"` is still valid in the new type (`'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`). The only change is the addition of `'stateful'`. **No change needed** — `"link"` is still valid.

### Fix 2 — Icon children to prop for Button (line 342)
Looking at the Button at line 342: `<Button variant="link" onClick={handleCancelResource}>{t('Cancel')}</Button>`. The children are just text `{t('Cancel')}` — there is **no icon** in this Button. **No change needed.**

### Fix 3 — Icon children to prop for HelperTextItem (line 294)
Looking at line 294: `<HelperTextItem>{t('Unique name of the TLSPolicy.')}</HelperTextItem>`. The children are just text — there is **no icon**. **No change needed.**

### Fix 4 — Page `banner` prop (line 235)
Looking at line 235: `<Page>` with `<PageSection>` children. There is no banner-like content in the children. The children are all `PageSection` elements which are appropriate children of `Page`, not banner content. **No change needed.**

### Fix 5 — PageSection `variant="light"` → `variant="default"` (lines 236 and 278)
The value `"light"` is no longer valid. The valid values are `"default"` and `"secondary"`. In PatternFly v5, `"light"` was the light-themed variant. In v6, `"default"` replaces `"light"`. This needs to be changed at both locations.
Let me verify the final state of the file:

Both `variant="light"` instances have been changed to `variant="default"`, and the Button `variant="link"` remains unchanged (as intended).

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| Fix 1 | `Button.variant` type changed | **No change needed** | The value `"link"` is still valid in the new type union. The only change was the addition of `"stateful"`. |
| Fix 2 | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-button` | **No change needed** | The Button at line 342 contains only text children (`{t('Cancel')}`), no icon element. The rule does not apply. |
| Fix 3 | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem` | **No change needed** | The HelperTextItem at line 294 contains only text children (`{t('Unique name of the TLSPolicy.')}`), no icon element. The rule does not apply. |
| Fix 4 | `sd-new-absorbing-prop-page-banner` | **No change needed** | The `<Page>` children are all `<PageSection>` elements, which are standard Page children — none represent banner content that should be moved to the `banner` prop. |
| Fix 5 | `sd-prop-value-pagesection-variant-light` | **Applied** | Changed `variant="light"` to `variant="default"` at both line 236 and line 278. In PF v6, `"default"` is the direct replacement for the removed `"light"` value. |

Both `variant="light"` instances have been changed to `variant="default"`, and the Button `variant="link"` remains unchanged (as intended).

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| Fix 1 | `Button.variant` type changed | **No change needed** | The value `"link"` is still valid in the new type union. The only change was the addition of `"stateful"`. |
| Fix 2 | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-button` | **No change needed** | The Button at line 342 contains only text children (`{t('Cancel')}`), no icon element. The rule does not apply. |
| Fix 3 | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem` | **No change needed** | The HelperTextItem at line 294 contains only text children (`{t('Unique name of the TLSPolicy.')}`), no icon element. The rule does not apply. |
| Fix 4 | `sd-new-absorbing-prop-page-banner` | **No change needed** | The `<Page>` children are all `<PageSection>` elements, which are standard Page children — none represent banner content that should be moved to the `banner` prop. |
| Fix 5 | `sd-prop-value-pagesection-variant-light` | **Applied** | Changed `variant="light"` to `variant="default"` at both line 236 and line 278. In PF v6, `"default"` is the direct replacement for the removed `"light"` value. |
